kv_namespaces.notes: Refresh-token mapping (user_id → rotating refresh token SHA). Written by auth.ts, read by auth middleware.
IP + endpoint → timestamp bucket. Written by globalRateLimit middleware.
Multi-purpose: learnings:<branche> (TTL 14d), cron:status:*, cron:last:* (TTL 7d), oa:* (read-only via /api/oa), health-check.

r2_buckets.notes: Antrags-PDFs + backups. Written by reports.ts, backup.ts. Read via download_tokens.
Fördermittel-check dokumente uploads. Written + read by worker-check /api/checks/:sessionId/docs.

data_flows.note: Three favorite tables exist; actual writer is /api/me/favoriten.
Upload endpoint only on PR #26 (not merged).

findings.summary: Same table name 'users' in TWO different D1 databases with DIFFERENT schemas (zfbf-db: 32 cols, bafa_antraege: 40 cols). Worker routes inconsistently query each. Root of silent data-loss bugs.
findings.evidence: Schema dump shows two distinct 'users' CREATE TABLE DDLs

findings.summary: Three 'favorites' tables across two DBs: zfbf-db.favorites, bafa_antraege.foerdermittel_favoriten, bafa_antraege.me_favoriten. Two wrapper paths (fund24.ts + check.ts) may write to different ones.
antraege (16 cols) and antraege_v2 (19 cols) coexist in bafa_antraege. Worker uses _v2 but legacy table remains migrated+indexed — dual-write/dual-read risk.
findings.evidence: Both tables present in schema dump

findings.summary: Two audit_logs tables (zfbf-db + bafa_antraege). No single source of truth for compliance/forensics.
berater_profile (singular, zfbf-db, 11 cols) vs berater_profiles (plural, bafa_antraege, 17 cols). Naming drift.

Most bafa_antraege tables have 0-1 indexes. unternehmen (34 cols, 0 idx), berater_profiles (17 cols, 0 idx), provisions_modelle, forum_*, rechtsrahmen, kombinationsregeln. Dashboard queries scale linearly.
8 foerdermittel_* tables duplicated across zfbf-db AND bafa_antraege (profile, cases, matches, dokumente, funnel_templates, conversations, case_steps, benachrichtigungen). 16 instances total.
CHECK_DB (foerdermittel-checks) bound to BOTH workers. check_sessions, check_chat, check_ergebnisse written only by worker-check; main worker proxies.
BAFA_CERTS R2 bucket NOT bound. GAP-002 (PR #26) designed but unmerged → berater cannot upload cert.
findings.evidence: Only REPORTS R2 in main wrangler

findings.summary: bafa_antraege.unternehmen (34 cols, 0 idx) — even WHERE user_id = ? is a full scan. Drop-FK migrations (024, 025) removed FKs but didn't add replacement indexes.
ki_konversationen, ki_usage, ki_verarbeitung stored in bafa_antraege — AI telemetry mixed with user data. Retention unclear.
